info.name: Inventory SaaS API Collection
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection for Inventory SaaS multi-tenant REST API (v1). Covers Sales (Customers, Invoices, Receipts, Credit Notes), Purchasing (Suppliers, Purchase Orders, GRNs, Bills, Vendor Payments), Inventory (Products, Variants, Stock Adjustments, Transfers, Bulk Imports), Accounting & General Ledger (Chart of Accounts, Journal Entries, Period Locking), Financial Reporting (Profit & Loss Jobs), Webhooks, and Health Probes.

request.description: Check if application is live.
Check readiness of database, queue, cache, storage.
Alias endpoint for framework health probes.
List all customers with pagination.
Create a new customer.
Retrieve specific customer by ID.
Update existing customer details.
List sales invoices filtered by status, dates, and customer.
Create a new sales invoice (enforces idempotency key).
Retrieve full details for an invoice including line items and receipts.
Void an existing invoice and reverse accounting entries.
Record customer payment against an invoice.
List all credit notes.
Create a sales credit note against an invoice or standalone.
Approve a credit note to issue credit to customer account.
List products with search and category filtering.
Create a product with initial variants.
Get all variants associated with a product.
Add a new variant to an existing product.
View stock levels for product across branches.
Adjust stock level in or out for a variant.
Transfer product variants between branches.
Queue bulk import job for products from a CSV file.
Queue bulk import job for stock adjustments from a CSV file.

formdata.description: CSV file containing stock adjustments data

request.description: Check processing status and summary of a bulk import job.
Get paginated row-level error details for a failed bulk import.
List all suppliers.
Register a new supplier.
Get details of a specific supplier.
Update supplier information.
List purchase orders with status and supplier filters.
Create a new purchase order.
Confirm purchase order and lock lines for receiving.
Cancel a purchase order.
List goods receipt notes.
Record received items from supplier and update stock layers.
List vendor bills with status filter.
Record a vendor bill linked to GRN or standalone.
Approve bill for payment processing and general ledger posting.
Record payment made to vendor against a bill.
Retrieve general ledger chart of accounts.
List general ledger journal entries.
Retrieve detailed journal entry lines.
Create balanced manual double-entry journal.
Lock an accounting period to prevent retroactive changes.
Queue async generation of Profit & Loss report.
Check status of a queued report generation job.
Retrieve completed Profit & Loss report data.
List active webhook subscriptions.
Subscribe a webhook endpoint to platform events.
Deactivate a webhook endpoint subscription.
